notes: Near-miss: info-leak recovered shared mapping offset via PID-based seed, cross-process write achieved but no code exec

info-leak Phase 2b: shared mapping offset derived from PID-based seed at /proc/target/maps. Offset computed, cross-process write lands at controlled target address. proof=miss — the write corrupts a data field, not a function pointer, so no code execution to produce a capturable flag.
